title.en: Faced with Ye Tian's choice, the Kunwu Supreme ...

content.en:
Faced with Ye Tian's choice, the Kunwu Supreme did not dissuade him.

Before summoning Ye Tian, many supreme beings of the Terran race also held a meeting to discuss it, between letting Ye Tian participate or not participating, they suggested that Ye Tian should participate, which was a good thing for the Terran race.

If Ye Tian doesn't participate, the Terrans will inevitably have to divide one or two star fields, in fact, the loss of one or two star fields is not a big deal, the key is that if you lose one or two star fields, you will be settled by those forces, and this group of terrifying guys around you is definitely not a good thing for the Terrans.

In addition, if Ye Tian does not participate in the duel, he will invisibly get some cosmic clans, after all, Ye Tian is recognized as the strongest genius in the universe, and his combat power is definitely the most terrifying among the galaxy level, wouldn't such a genius not participate in it will make them lose!

What's more, Ye Tian can't avoid the battle all the time, even if he doesn't participate in the decisive battle this time, he will be provoked by those sons of the era and forced to fight.

Rather than this, it is better to join the war now, at least let the Protoss and the Demon Race pay attention to Ye Tian of the Terran Race, and make them feel that Ye Tian is the potential seed to fight against these forces, so that they will help to protect the Terran.

Otherwise, the human race would definitely not be able to bear it in the face of those terrifying supremes.

"Ye Tian, be careful! This time, the opponents are not those of the previous ones, but the son of the era, an existence beyond the level of the son of the universe. I know that you have also reached the level of the children of the era, but the children of the era are also divided into strong and weak, and those sons of the era may be above you in terms of inheritance and heritage!"

"Kungo Supreme, I understand!"

Ye Tianying said.

"Go back in three years, you can prepare a little in these three years!"

Kunwu Supreme Dao.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

In the blink of an eye, three years have passed.

In such a short period of time, it was unrealistic for Ye Tian to make great progress, he just ran in his combat power and stabilized his foundation.

this day.

Kunwu Supreme took Ye Tian to the center of the universe, and all the major races in the universe sent the Supreme to go, even if they didn't send people to participate in the battle, but such a big thing involved every universe clan, and they naturally wanted to come to watch the battle.

And the first god lord of the god race and the first demon lord of the demon race also came in person to witness this galaxy-level battle.

Soon, the black hole in the center of the universe arrived.

"Ye Tian, it's here!"

Kunwu Supreme Dao.

Ye Tian glanced around and sensed a powerful aura, which was a supreme.

Distance.

One after another majestic figures emerged, and the aura on those figures seemed to be incompatible with this universe, but they were integrated into this universe.

"These should be the supremes of those forces, they are really powerful, and they are even more terrifying than the Kunwu supreme, but these supremes are divided into many forces, and they are a little far away from each other, so they shouldn't be very harmonious!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But if you think about it carefully, these forces didn't know each other before, they didn't come from one cosmic era, but from multiple cosmic epochs, and now they just came to this cosmic epoch together.

They may have formed an alliance on an ad hoc basis, and they were not so united.

This is also a flaw of theirs!

Otherwise, if these forces are truly united, the universe races of this cosmic era will be even more troublesome.

"Twelve forces!"

Ye Tian judged it.

Judging from the position of these supremes, these supremes belong to a total of twelve forces, of course, the ancient supremes that appear here are not all of them, maybe only a small part of them.

But roughly, there should be only twelve forces.

"When I was in the Hades Temple, that machine spirit said that our universe is now the thirteenth era, so in this case, these ten forces should belong to the forces of the twelve universe eras, and perhaps the forces composed of the top supremes of the twelve universe eras!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Rumble!!!!!

A huge ring appeared in the void, surrounded by thrones, on which the Supreme Beings sat one after another.

Then.

A supreme appeared in front of him, with the appearance of a middle-aged man, with strange lines on his body, as well as an extremely yin aura, and he was a supreme who belonged to one of the twelve major forces.

"To introduce, I am the founder of the Yuan Gu Temple of the First Universe Era, the Lord of the Yuan Gu!"

As soon as these words came out, the audience was shocked.

Even Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

He had entered the Yuan Gu Palace, and he had also obtained amazing opportunities in the Yuan Gu Palace, such as the Tian Yuan True Method, which was a supreme secret method that directly pointed to the seventh-order life, if there was no such secret method, he would be far less powerful now.

He also obtained a god-level poison curse talent in the Yuangu Palace, which was also a very terrifying talent.

It can be said that a Yuan Gu Temple has allowed all races in the universe to obtain countless benefits.

Unexpectedly, the founder of the Yuangu Palace, the Lord of the Yuangu, has now appeared!

"I can't feel a breath!"

Ye Tian frowned.

He couldn't sense the strength of the Lord of the Yuangu, and it was obvious that the Lord of the Yuangu had deliberately shielded his breath.

"Take a look at it with the Copy Talent!"

Ye Tian thought.

His copying talent now has a wide range of viewing, and it is not a problem to see the location of the Lord of the Yuan Gu.

Swish!

Ye Tian instantly scanned the Lord of the Yuan Gu with his copying talent.

Suddenly, the talent of the Lord of the Yuan Gu appeared in his sight.

"What, the Lord of the Yuan Gu actually has a super god-level spatial talent!!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Space Talent: Super God Level

In addition to the super god-level space talent, the Lord of the Yuan Gu also has a god-level poison curse talent, and the other talents are relatively normal, all of which are common god-level talents and levelless talents.

Agitated!

Ye Tian was very excited!

Although he now has a super-god-level space-time talent, he is a second-class super-god-level space-time talent, and if he copies this super-god-level space-time talent, his space-time talent will immediately transform into a real super-god-level space-time talent.

At that time, his combat power will immediately lead to an unimaginable transformation!

"It's the right time this time, otherwise how can I have a chance to come into contact with a character like the Lord of the Yuangu!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

"Copy!"

Ye Tian instantly copied the super god-level spatial talent of the Lord of the Yuan Gu, but he didn't immediately fuse, in the eyes of so many supremes, if he fused the super-god-level spatial talent, wouldn't it be immediately exposed?

"Let's fuse when we get back!"

Ye Tian decided.

Subsequently, Ye Tian checked the talents of the other supremes, one of them was a super god-level time talent, but it was a pity that it was useless to him.

In addition to these two talents, the talent that satisfied Ye Tian the most was the god-level heart moment talent!

This is a rare talent, and judging from the name, it feels that this talent is not simple, so Ye Tian also copied it, and then fused it after he went back.

Having harvested the super god-level space talent and the god-level heart instant talent, Ye Tian was in a good mood and waited for the duel to begin!
